# Vibeat — Project Documentation

> Generated by docmd

## Documentation Files

- [Canonical Data Schemas](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/01-core-specifications/api-system-specifications/data-schemas/)
  Field-level schemas for Vibeat's canonical province/ward datasets.
- [API / System Specifications](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/01-core-specifications/api-system-specifications/)
  REST (OpenAPI), async events (AsyncAPI), and canonical data schemas — the interface contracts.
- [Executable Specifications (BDD)](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/01-core-specifications/executable-specifications/)
  Business logic as Gherkin feature files — human-readable and machine-executable.
- [1.1.1 Core Specifications (The Source of Truth)](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/01-core-specifications/)
  API/system specifications and executable BDD specifications — the authoritative contracts.
- [1.1.2 Authored System Documentation](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/)
  High-level context the specs don't capture: the Software Architecture Document and UX design.
- [Architecture Principles](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/software-architecture-document/architecture-principles/)
  The non-negotiable rules that govern every specification, design, and line of code.
- [Backend — Modular Monolith (Spring Modulith)](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/software-architecture-document/backend-modular-monolith/)
  Module structure, boundaries, event-driven integration, and persistence for the Spring Boot backend.
- [DDD & Domain Model](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/software-architecture-document/ddd-and-domain-model/)
  Ubiquitous language, context map, domain model, and the four bounded contexts.
- [ADR 0001 — Record architecture decisions with ADRs](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/software-architecture-document/decisions/0001-use-adrs/)
  We record significant technical decisions as immutable, numbered ADRs.
- [ADR 0002 — Modular monolith with Spring Modulith](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/software-architecture-document/decisions/0002-modular-monolith-with-spring-modulith/)
  Build the backend as a Spring Modulith modular monolith whose modules are extractable to services.
- [ADR 0003 — React Native for cross-platform mobile](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/software-architecture-document/decisions/0003-react-native-for-mobile/)
  Use React Native + TypeScript to ship iOS and Android from one codebase.
- [ADR 0004 — Java 25 + Spring Boot as backend platform](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/software-architecture-document/decisions/0004-java-and-spring-boot/)
  Use Java 25 (LTS) with Spring Boot 3.x and Gradle for the backend.
- [ADR 0005 — PostgreSQL + event-driven module integration](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/software-architecture-document/decisions/0005-postgresql-and-event-driven-integration/)
  PostgreSQL with schema-per-module and domain events over a transactional outbox.
- [Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/software-architecture-document/decisions/)
  Significant technical decisions — the choice, context, and consequences.
- [Frontend Architecture (React Native)](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/software-architecture-document/frontend-architecture/)
  The React Native app structure, data/state, and navigation — feature folders mirroring the bounded contexts.
- [Software Architecture Document (SAD)](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/software-architecture-document/)
  System context, C4 models, and the architecture of Vibeat's backend, frontend, and infrastructure.
- [Infrastructure](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/software-architecture-document/infrastructure/)
  Deployment topology and environments for the backend and mobile app.
- [Service Extraction Playbook](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/software-architecture-document/service-extraction-playbook/)
  How to lift a Spring Modulith module into a standalone service when a real driver appears.
- [Design System](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/ux-design-documentation/design-system/)
  Design tokens (color, type, spacing, radius) and component rules, encoded for the app.
- [UX Design Documentation](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/ux-design-documentation/)
  Design system, theming, localization, and experience principles for the Vibeat app.
- [Localization (i18n)](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/02-authored-system-documentation/ux-design-documentation/localization/)
  Vietnamese + English parity across UI and backend-served content.
- [API Reference Documentation](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/03-generated-system-artifacts/api-reference-documentation/)
  Interactive REST reference generated from the OpenAPI spec.
- [1.1.3 Generated System Artifacts](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/03-generated-system-artifacts/)
  Auto-generated from the Core Specifications — never hand-edited.
- [Quality Assurance Reports](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/03-generated-system-artifacts/quality-assurance-reports/)
  Contract-testing results, spec-compliance, and module-boundary verification output.
- [Source Code Models / Interfaces](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/03-generated-system-artifacts/source-code-models/)
  Typed clients, DTOs, and module diagrams generated from the specs.
- [Developer Integration Guides](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/04-user-documentation/developer-integration-guides/)
  How developers build against and contribute to Vibeat (partially generated).
- [End-user Documentation](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/04-user-documentation/end-user-documentation/)
  Help content for Explorers using the Vibeat mobile app.
- [1.1.4 User Documentation](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/04-user-documentation/)
  Docs for the people who use, integrate with, and operate Vibeat.
- [CI/CD](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/04-user-documentation/system-admin-documentation/ci-cd/)
  Build, test, and delivery pipelines for backend and mobile.
- [Deployment & Release](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/04-user-documentation/system-admin-documentation/deployment/)
  How the backend and mobile app are released.
- [System Admin Documentation](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/04-user-documentation/system-admin-documentation/)
  Operating the running system: deployment, CI/CD, observability, security, runbooks.
- [Observability](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/04-user-documentation/system-admin-documentation/observability/)
  Logs, metrics, traces, health checks, and alerting.
- [Runbooks](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/04-user-documentation/system-admin-documentation/runbooks/)
  Step-by-step operational procedures.
- [Security](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/04-user-documentation/system-admin-documentation/security/)
  Authentication, secrets, and data protection.
- [1.1 Product Documentation](https://docs.vibeat.app/01-product-documentation/)
  Everything describing what Vibeat is and how the system behaves.
- [1.2 Process Documentation](https://docs.vibeat.app/02-process-documentation/)
  How the team plans, standardizes, tests, and ships Vibeat.
- [Plans, Estimates, Schedules](https://docs.vibeat.app/02-process-documentation/plans-estimates-schedules/)
  The two-engineer delivery roadmap taking Vibeat from scratch to production.
- [Release Checklist](https://docs.vibeat.app/02-process-documentation/release-checklist/)
  Pre-release verification for backend and mobile.
- [Reports](https://docs.vibeat.app/02-process-documentation/reports/)
  Status, quality, and delivery reporting.
- [Agile Product Roadmaps & Backlogs](https://docs.vibeat.app/02-process-documentation/roadmaps-and-backlogs/)
  Roadmap themes and the prioritized backlog of features.
- [API Design Guidelines](https://docs.vibeat.app/02-process-documentation/sdd-standards/api-design-guidelines/)
  Conventions for REST/OpenAPI and event/AsyncAPI contracts.
- [Documentation Conventions](https://docs.vibeat.app/02-process-documentation/sdd-standards/documentation-conventions/)
  How docs in this repo are written, named, and organized.
- [SDD Standards](https://docs.vibeat.app/02-process-documentation/sdd-standards/)
  The standards that keep specs, APIs, modules, and docs consistent.
- [Module Boundary Rules](https://docs.vibeat.app/02-process-documentation/sdd-standards/module-boundary-rules/)
  The Spring Modulith rules every backend change must uphold.
- [Test Strategy](https://docs.vibeat.app/02-process-documentation/test-strategy/)
  Contract- and spec-focused testing across backend and mobile.
- [Vibeat — Project Documentation](https://docs.vibeat.app/)
  Knowledge base for Vibeat (Vie-Go): Spring Boot / Java 25 backend, React Native mobile, Spec-Driven Development, and DDD.
